title: Unrecognised evidence source triggers unclassified_pending and escalation

evidence_item.transaction_narration: NEFT CR — received from unknown counterparty

notes: A bank credit with no AIS category and no TDS section cannot be classified by R-0006. The rule correctly returns unclassified_pending, adds to the conflict log, reduces ECS, and triggers an intake question asking the taxpayer to identify the income source. This tests the else branch of R-0006.
